pkgmetadata.longdescription: Orchestration layer for Gentoo overlay ebuild lifecycle management. Automates version discovery (via nvchecker), ebuild bumping, QA validation (via pkgcheck), Docker-based build testing (via ebuildtester), USE-flag matrix generation, and post-install validation. Designed for overlay maintainers who want a single CLI to manage daily version bumps with full pipeline automation.

use.flag: Enable Docker-based build testing via app-portage/ebuildtester
Enable MCP (Model Context Protocol) server interface for AI agent integration
Enable QA tooling: dev-util/nvchecker, dev-util/pkgcheck, dev-util/pkgdev
